description: Add homepage URL to the Discord plugin so the side panel 'open tab' feature can open discord.com when no matching tab exists.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/discord && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Discord plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://discord.com/channels/@me' to both the Discord plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscordPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://discord.com/channels/@me' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/discord/src/index.ts (add homepage property to DiscordPlugin class)
- plugins/discord/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The DiscordPlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class DiscordPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'discord';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Discord';
  override readonly displayName = 'Discord';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://discord.com/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://discord.com/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://discord.com/channels/@me';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://discord.com/channels/@me"
```

Constraints:
- Use `https://discord.com/channels/@me` (the DM home screen), NOT just `https://discord.com` (which is the marketing page).
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
